title: Banners & Tier Lists
description: Current banners, future releases, tier lists, and Umamusume reviews.
html:
Umamusume Reference Document

~ Global Edition ~
By Erzzy, terms updated with help from Kireina(Discord).
If you play on the Japanese Server, check Umamusume Reference (5th Anniversary) instead

This guide is aimed towards players who want to optimize performance in competitive PvP modes. If you only want to read the stories or collect the horse girls, you won’t need this. Check the “Basic Training Strategy” part of the Strategy tab and enjoy life.

Feel free to translate or share parts of the document or the entire thing, as long as you don’t charge people to access it and you link to this document with a note, such as “Translated from…” or “From…” Consider it CC BY-NC.

Quick Links: Support Card Tier List | How Good is X uma? | Future Sight Info (spoilers)

“How does the game really work?”
🧑‍🔬Mechanics🧑‍🔬

📺 Recent Video Guide 📺
Scenario Four Survival Guide - Scenario Four, known as Grand Live on JP. A scenario about resource management, and the last one I played heavily. This video goes over the core strategy and mechanics you need to know to make effective umas in it. As usual, the newest one makes the best umas. For more details and advanced strategy, see the Strategy tab. The new info has been brought over.

Summer Gold Ship - Summer Gold Ship is a game-changing parent for Team Trials and will be used for every Team Trials uma for the rest of time. Her unique triggers a gold skill, including ones that aren’t usable on the current track, which increases Team Trials consistency and opens up some weird builds.

Table Of Contents
This tab mainly contains things that change frequently along with a few things that don’t really fit anywhere else. Use the links at the top, or the view on the left, to go to the other tabs.
